title: French Veal Casserole
description: A classic French dish made with tender veal and rich flavors, perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Season the veal cutlets with salt and pepper.
Dredge the veal cutlets in flour, shaking off excess.
Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Sear the veal cutlets until browned on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the veal cutlets to a baking dish.
In the same skillet, add the French breadcrumbs and cook until lightly browned.
Sprinkle the breadcrumbs over the veal cutlets.
Pour the milk over the breadcrumbs.
Sprinkle the Gruyère cheese over the top.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with fresh thyme and serve hot.
